items.title: The NBA will experiment with new free throw rules during summer league. Players will take one free throw and it will be worth the same amount of points as the amount of free throws it replaces. So if a player got fouled on a 3, then that FT will be worth 3 points. The NBA graphic
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt: The NBA will experiment with new free throw rules during summer league. Players will take one free throw and it will be worth the same amount of points as the amount of free throws it replaces. So if a player got fouled on a 3, then that FT will be worth 3 points. The NBA graphic explainer:

items.author: Caitlin Cooper

Another number that stands out:

The 2024-25 Pacers ranked second in passes per 100 possessions, and posted the fastest average touch length in six seasons.

Among the 161 players who averaged at least five drives per game last season, Oubre ranked 159th in pass percentage (12.7 percent).

items.title: "Brown's job ... was to bail Boston out and he did, one long 2 at a time. It was an MVP-level season, the advanced stats can walk some tracks. Brown began breaks and finished them, he held up to superstar scrutiny every night and by himself, something Jayson Tatum's never had to
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: "Brown's job ... was to bail Boston out and he did, one long 2 at a time. It was an MVP-level season, the advanced stats can walk some tracks. Brown began breaks and finished them, he held up to superstar scrutiny every night and by himself, something Jayson Tatum's never had to do. Until now."

items.title: I forgot Walker Kessler was in the Rudy Gobert trade.
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt: I forgot Walker Kessler was in the Rudy Gobert trade.

images.alt:
Alt text:

"The deal" graphic showing the Rudy Gobert trade between Minnesota and Utah. Minnesota received: Rudy Gobert, C. Utah received: Patrick Beverley, G; Malik Beasley, G; Walker Kessler, C; Jarred Vanderbilt, F; Leandro Bolmaro, G; 2023 unprotected first-round pick (used on Keyonte George); 2025 unprotected first-round pick (used on Will Riley, later traded to Washington in a package for Walter Clayton Jr.); 2026 first-round pick swap; 2027 unprotected first-round pick; 2029 top-five protected first-round pick.

items.title: There is actually no retirement mechanism in the NBA that changes anybody's contract. If he decides that he's retiring while under contract, the Celtics will have to fight to void the deal. A guy and his situation will most likely just play out the deal and quit after the contrac
items.author: John Karalis
items.body_excerpt: There is actually no retirement mechanism in the NBA that changes anybody's contract. If he decides that he's retiring while under contract, the Celtics will have to fight to void the deal. A guy and his situation will most likely just play out the deal and quit after the contract is up

items.title: Jaylen Brown is not the best player on the floor from the moment Tatum steps out there.
items.author: AdamTaylorNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Jaylen Brown is not the best player on the floor from the moment Tatum steps out there. 

He kills the rhythm and ball movement. Was a leader in iso possessions. Had ooor efficiency on a high volume of bad shots. 

The analytics back up what the film work says.
